user.title: Karlstadsenergi
user.description: Log in to your Karlstadsenergi account. Customer number and password is recommended for most users.

data_description.auth_method: Choose customer number & password for the simplest setup. BankID is available as an alternative but requires signing with the BankID app.

bankid_personnummer.title: Karlstadsenergi - BankID
bankid_personnummer.description: Enter your personnummer to start BankID authentication.

data_description.personnummer: Your 10 or 12 digit Swedish personal identity number (e.g. 199001011234).

password.title: Karlstadsenergi - Login
password.description: Enter your customer number and password.

data_description.customer_number: Your customer number (found on your invoice).
data_description.password: Your password for the customer portal.

bankid.title: Karlstadsenergi - BankID
bankid.description:
Open BankID on your phone and sign in.

On your phone: [Open BankID app](bankid:///?autostarttoken={auto_start_token}&redirect=null)

After signing, click **Submit**.

select_account.title: Karlstadsenergi - Select account
select_account.description: Multiple accounts found. Choose which customer account to use. Each account represents a separate billing relationship with Karlstadsenergi.

data_description.account: Select the customer account to configure.

reauth_confirm_password.title: Karlstadsenergi - Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm_password.description: Session expired. You will be asked to re-authenticate with your customer number and password. Click Submit to continue.

reauth_confirm_bankid.title: Karlstadsenergi - Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm_bankid.description: Session expired. You will be asked to re-authenticate with BankID. Click Submit to continue.

error.bankid_pending: BankID not yet signed. Open BankID app and try again.

init.title: Options
init.description: Configure update settings for the Karlstadsenergi integration.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch new data from Karlstadsenergi (1-24 hours).
data_description.history_years: How many years of historical consumption and cost data to import into long-term statistics. More history means richer Energy Dashboard graphs, but the first import may be slow with many years of hourly data (roughly 9,000 data points per year). Default: 2 years.

error.invalid_interval: Update interval must be between 1 and 24 hours.
error.invalid_history_years: Statistics history must be between 1 and 10 years.
